title: Genomic DNA Extraction from Cells
author: Bao Thai
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.nk4dcyw

steps.title: Extract genomic DNA from cells with...
steps.instruction: Extract genomic DNA from cells with Quick Extract buffer (QE – Epibio #QE09050).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add 100ul QE / well (24-well...
steps.instruction: Add 100ul QE / well (24-well plates, scale up for your plate size).

steps.title: Transfer to PCR tubes, 100 uL each tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to PCR tubes, 100 uL each tube.

steps.title: Vortex for 15sec, centrifuge to collect liquid in bottom
steps.instruction: Vortex for 15sec, centrifuge to collect liquid in bottom.

steps.title: Put PCR tubes in thermocycler
steps.instruction: Put PCR tubes in thermocycler: 20min at 65C, 20min at 95C, store at -20C.

steps.title: Measure concentration with Nanodrop
steps.instruction: Measure concentration with Nanodrop. Use QE buffer as blank.
